name: Flowering Process
description: Flowering Process process visualization. This process flowchart outlines key steps, checks, and outputs.
mermaid:
graph TD
    A7[Vegetative Growth] --> B7[Floral Induction Signals]
    C7[Photoperiod] --> D7[Vernalization]

    E7 --> F7

    G7 --> H7[Sepal Formation]

    H7 --> L7[Flower Development]
    I7 --> L7
    J7 --> L7
    K7 --> L7
    L7 --> M7[Anthesis]
